Appearance

EligiusHiddenArmorHigh-efficiency armor hider

Hide armors with zero server lag via packets. Folia support and cross-server Redis synchronization.

Installation
Download Release

Zero Lag (Native API)

Hides armors purely on network level using PacketEvents without creating garbage in physical memory.

Folia & Scalability

Asynchronous architecture ready for distributed networks using HikariCP for concurrent MySQL/SQLite connections.

Redis Synchronization

Instant real-time synchronization across proxy networks via Redis Pub/Sub.

Anonymous Metrics

Uses bStats to collect anonymous server statistics (like database and platform usage) to help us improve.

Released under the MIT License.
